name: Raspberry Pretzel Delight
recipeIngredient: 1 package (3.4 oz) Instant vanilla pudding mix and pie filling
1 (21 oz) can Raspberry fruit pie filling
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 16
Crust:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. In a large bowl, combine all crust ingredients; mix well. Press into an ungreased 13 x 9 inch pan. Bake for 8 minutes; cool.
In the same large bowl, combine condensed milk and water; blend well. Beat in pudding mix for 2 minutes. Refrigerate for 5 minutes. Fold in whipped topping. Spread on cooled crust. Refrigerate until filling is firm, about 1 hour.
Spoon fruit topping over filling. Cover; refrigerate until serving time. Garnish with frozen whipped topping, fresh raspberries and mint leaves if desired.
Store in refrigerator.
